title: salix vagans var. linnaeana
intro: Salix vagans var. linnaeana is a variety of the willow plant, belonging to the Salicaceae family and native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which provides its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of Salix vagans var. linnaeana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and joint pain, and support the immune system. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
